name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ count \in 0..K

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotTaken
N == 3
channels == <<1,2>, <2,3>, <3,1>>  \* List of channels (source, destination)

(* Helper functions *)
IsMarker(msg) == msg = "marker"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "initial"]
        /\ channel = [c \in channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshotTaken = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \* Process p receives a message from channel (q,p)
  \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N, q # p
        /\ channelq..p /= <<>>
        /\ msg = Head(channelq..p)
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !q..p = Tail(channelq..p)]
        /\ IF IsMarker(msg) THEN
             /\ snapshotTaken' = [snapshotTaken EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
             /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT !q..p = TRUE]

             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "updated"]
             /\ markerSent' = markerSent
             /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
        /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, snapshotTaken>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N, q # p
        /\ snapshotTaken[p] = TRUE
        /\ markerSentq..p = FALSE
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !q..p = Append(channelq..p, "marker")]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !q..p = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerReceived, snapshotTaken>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N
        /\ snapshotTaken[p] = FALSE
        /\ channel' = channel
        /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "updated"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshotTaken>>

(* Invariant : All markers are eventually received *)
TypeOK == /\ \A p \in 1..N : \A q \in 1..N, q # p : 
           markerSentq..p = TRUE => markerReceivedq..p = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotTaken>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [msg \in 1..N |-> IF msg = token THEN [m \in 1..N |-> FALSE] ELSE messages[msg] ]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values
